items.title: Zubac’s addition to Indiana stole the headlines in February, but with the lack of moves they’ve made this summer, the team is now falling under the radar. Had Indiana made this move in July, everyone would be talking about them as a force in the East.
items.author: Alex Golden
items.body_excerpt:
Zubac’s addition to Indiana stole the headlines in February, but with the lack of moves they’ve made this summer, the team is now falling under the radar. Had Indiana made this move in July, everyone would be talking about them as a force in the East.

items.title: Keaton Wagler to the Clippers with the Pacers pick. So Wagler, Bennedict Mathurin, Isaiah Jackson, a 2029 unprotected first-round pick, and a 2028 second-round pick (via Dallas) for Ivica Zubac and Kobe Brown.

items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler to the Clippers with the Pacers pick. So Wagler, Bennedict Mathurin, Isaiah Jackson, a 2029 unprotected first-round pick, and a 2028 second-round pick (via Dallas) for Ivica Zubac and Kobe Brown.

items.title: Zubac on his 5 Pacers games: "Definitely helped with [getting] a feel for how this team wants to play, about the pace, about defensive coverages, the defensive rotations. Offensively, where they want me to be, what they want me to do. It definitely helped."
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Zubac on his 5 Pacers games: "Definitely helped with [getting] a feel for how this team wants to play, about the pace, about defensive coverages, the defensive rotations. Offensively, where they want me to be, what they want me to do. It definitely helped."

🔗: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-ivic...

items.title: You may have seen some pictures of Jenny Boucek and Jim Boylen with Ivica Zubac overseas. Zubac is on the Croatia squad for the upcoming FIBA World Cup 2027 qualifying window. They play Italy in a friendly on June 24, the competition starts in early July.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: You may have seen some pictures of Jenny Boucek and Jim Boylen with Ivica Zubac overseas. Zubac is on the Croatia squad for the upcoming FIBA World Cup 2027 qualifying window. They play Italy in a friendly on June 24, the competition starts in early July.
